symptoms.symptom_name: Thick scrapable white plaques with raw bleeding base

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Scrapable pseudomembranous plaques with an erythematous base are classic for thrush.
Leukoplakia is adherent and cannot be scraped off.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe odynophagia with inability to swallow saliva and dehydration

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Severe odynophagia/inability to swallow suggests oesophageal extension needing systemic therapy, and drives the dehydration emergency.
Antibiotic use and frailty/immunosuppression strongly predispose to candidal overgrowth.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Bloods: U&E/creatinine, FBC, glucose (hydration/AKI, immune/diabetes screen)
Consider evaluation for immunosuppression (e.g., diabetes, HIV, steroid use)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Severe oesophageal candidiasis warrants a cause.
To confirm oesophageal candidiasis if not responding to empirical fluconazole.
